description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu:latest Docker image and runs apt-get update -qq as a before_script. Define three stages (build, test, deploy) and in the build stage add a build_linux job that installs gcc g++ make python3.12-dev, runs ./build.sh, and archives release_build/OpenSimRoot as a one‑year artifact. Also in the build stage add a build_windows job that installs gcc, make and mingw-w64, runs ./build_win64.sh, and stores windows_build/OpenSimRoot.exe as a one‑year artifact. In the test stage add a testEngine job that needs build_linux, installs libpython3.12-dev, and runs ./runTestsEngine.sh, and a testModules job that also needs build_linux, sets DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive, creates /root/.aws/, writes a region to credentials, installs bc r-cran-xml libpython3.12-dev, and runs ./runTestsModules.sh. Finally, in the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, needs both build jobs, installs zip, copies XML schema and assets into public/, copies the built executables into public/executables/, zips the test and input files into inputfiles_osr.zip and moves it into public/inputfiles/, then publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact for three years with the environment named pages at https://not.used.de.
